tests.scenario: Maintaining a stable connection during meditation
steps: Start a meditation session
Simulate a network problem while in the session
tests.expected_result: The app displays an error message or pauses the session with a clear indication of the issue

tests.scenario: User navigates to a feature and expects a quick response
steps: Launch the app
Tap on the 'Start Meditation' button
tests.expected_result: The app responds within 2 seconds and displays the meditation interface without noticeable delays

steps: Log in to account
Navigate to account settings
tests.expected_result: View, update, and cancel subscription plan options are available

tests.scenario: User receives clear notification about upcoming subscription renewal and pricing details
steps: Log in to account
View account dashboard with approaching subscription renewal
tests.expected_result: Clear notification about upcoming renewal and pricing details is displayed

tests.scenario: App recovers from technical issue during meditation session
steps: Launch the meditation app and start a new session
Simulate a technical issue by forcing the app to crash during the session
tests.expected_result: The app automatically recovers or provides a seamless way to resume the meditation session without data loss

steps: Download meditation content for offline use
Turn off internet connection
Open the meditation app
Select a downloaded meditation session to play
tests.expected_result: The downloaded meditation session plays without performance issues or loss of functionality

tests.scenario: Access to core mental wellness features without paywalls
steps: The user navigates to the system's homepage
The user searches for and accesses the core mental wellness features
tests.expected_result: The user can access core mental wellness features without encountering paywalls or excessive subscription fees

steps: The user navigates to the premium features section
The user reviews the pricing model and benefits
tests.expected_result: The user understands the costs and benefits without feeling overcharged or misled

tests.scenario: User navigates to main menu and accesses features
steps: The user opens the meditation app
The user navigates to the main menu
tests.expected_result: The user can find and access meditation sessions, settings, and profile information within 2 clicks

tests.scenario: Clean and organized visual design for meditation session
steps: Launch the meditation app
Browse to a meditation session
tests.expected_result: The screen is free of unnecessary graphics and text, and the meditation guidance is clearly displayed in a calm and readable font
